name: @vektormemory/vorwatch
description: Vör's Watch — lightweight, dependency-free VPS anomaly detection: file integrity, port/process baselining, outbound IP reputation, package vulnerability scanning, CISA KEV cross-reference, trusted-CIDR noise filtering, known-bot annotation, rootkit detection, CIS-style hardening checks, nginx anomaly detection, optional email alerts. Recommend-only, never auto-bans.
author: Vektor Memory
